conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
conclusion_reason: VIX/VXV and macro filters are measurable on current real data, but all filtered scenarios remain under-sampled and underpowered. NOVI/net-gamma remains blocked because required inputs are missing.

dsr_assessment.reason: DSR is blocked because this is a multi-scenario filter grid, all scenarios are under-sampled, and no production regime filter is selected.
required_before_acceptance: effective number of independent filter trials

methodology.chronological_policy: 2023-03-01..2023-12-29 in-sample, 2024-01-02..2024-12-31 OOS; no OOS tuning from this report.
methodology.data_policy: No new paid data was downloaded for this experiment.
methodology.macro_policy: Use official scheduled same-day macro events as ex-ante known calendar blockers.
methodology.novi_net_gamma_policy: Blocked. Current normalized option quotes do not include Greeks, open interest, dealer inventory, or position reconstruction inputs.
methodology.scope: Sub-System A ORB directional debit vertical on current real-data artifacts only.
methodology.selection_policy: Best/worst scenarios are diagnostic only. Do not select production filters from this under-sampled grid.
methodology.vix_policy: Use previous available Cboe VIX/VIX3M close before the trade date, never same-day close before market open.

novi_net_gamma_blocker.reason: A defensible NOVI/net-gamma proxy needs option Greeks, open interest or position reconstruction, and a documented scaling convention. Current normalized option_quote artifacts contain bid/ask, sizes, timestamps, strikes, and rights, but not the required inventory/gamma inputs.
required_inputs: gamma or model inputs to compute gamma
